title: pedilonum pityphyllum
intro: Pedilonum pityphyllum, also known as Chinese angelica or Yangu, is a plant species native to China and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Apiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Pedilonum pityphyllum include reducing fever, alleviating pain and swelling, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Pedilonum pityphyllum can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
